SRx2.about: Takes x1 patch as input and predicts SRx2 patch

SRx4.about: Takes x4 predicted patch as input and predicts SRx4 patch

SRx8.about: Takes x8 predicted patch as input and predicts SRx8 patch

mods_to_use.about: Defining paths and iteration of models to be used

spot_find_args.about: parameters to be used for finding the diffraction spots in the frame.            The threshold is the minimum intensity of the diffraction spot to be considered.            The patch_size is the size of the patch to be used for finding the diffraction spots.

min_d.about: minimum distance (in pixels) between separate peaks in a patch

thresh_rel.about: threshold relative to the maximum intensity within the full diffraction patch for a peak to be considered

gauss_filter_sigma.about: sigma of the gaussian filter to be used for smoothing the patches before peak fitting

median_filter_size.about: size of the median filter to be used for smoothing the patches before peak fitting

peak_crop_size.about: size of the peak patch extracted around each position. Peak fitting is done on this patch.

pvfit_int_thresh.about: threshold (in SRx1 patch) used only for pseudo-voigt fitting of the patches

SRx2.about: shifts in Y and Z directions to be used in peak positions due to super-resolution factor

SRx4.about: shifts in Y and Z directions to be used in peak positions due to super-resolution factor

SRx8.about: shifts in Y and Z directions to be used in peak positions due to super-resolution factor
